issues.description: Main ability trigger should be 'Activated' (correct), but the condition is wrong. Condition checks for {Straw Hat Crew} type on board, but text says 'If your Leader has the {Straw Hat Crew} type' — should use LeaderHasType condition, not HasCardOnBoard.
Condition type should be 'LeaderHasType' with value 'Straw Hat Crew', not 'HasCardOnBoard' with name 'Straw Hat Crew'.
Action trashes 5 cards from deck, but uses TrashFromHand type. Should be generic trash/discard from deck. The text says 'trash 5 cards from the top of your deck' — this is not a hand discard.
Counter ability allows trashing 1 card from hand as cost (optional 'You may'), but DSL shows it as mandatory action. Should indicate this is optional/cost action.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards: If your Leader has the {Straw Hat Crew} type, trash 5 cards from the top of your deck. [Counter] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle.
